name: Fish and Potato Platter
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Salmon filets, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a small bowl; cover and chill.
2. Overlap potato slices around the edge of a round 12-inch platter. Cover and microwave at high for 3 minutes.
3. Uncover and place fish in a ring inside the potatoes with pieces end to end. Mound broccoli in the center of the platter.
4. Sprinkle fish and potatoes with lemon juice; cover. Microwave at high for 8 minutes or until the fish is cooked through and the potatoes are tender, giving the dish a half-turn at 4-minute intervals.
5. Serve with dill sauce.
